features.title: Duplicate Code Elimination
features.description: Remove code duplication across packages to improve maintainability

tasks.title: Consolidate PRIORITY_ORDER definitions
tasks.description: PRIORITY_ORDER is defined three times with different types - consolidate into a single shared constant
acceptanceCriteria: Single PRIORITY_ORDER definition in shared location
All packages import from shared location

tasks.title: Extract shared sorting utilities
tasks.description: sortByPriority logic is duplicated between core/canonical.ts and core/next-task.ts with subtle differences
acceptanceCriteria: Both recursive and shallow sorting supported

tasks.title: Consolidate circular dependency detection
tasks.description: detectCirculars is implemented twice with near-identical DFS logic in imports.ts and merge.ts
acceptanceCriteria: Both call sites use shared function

tasks.title: Extract shared viewer utilities
tasks.description: Remove duplicate utility functions across viewer components

features.title: Architecture Improvements
features.description: Address architectural issues and improve separation of concerns

tasks.title: Split enrich.ts god module
tasks.description: enrich.ts (925 lines) has 7-8 responsibilities - split into focused modules
acceptanceCriteria: Separate modules for prompt construction, AI lifecycle, JSON parsing, finding extraction

tasks.title: Fix store layer dependency inversion
tasks.description: Store layer imports core business logic instead of being a dumb persistence layer
acceptanceCriteria: Store depends only on schema types
Core business logic separated from persistence

tasks.title: Extract viewer rendering logic
tasks.description: views/graph.ts contains 436-line imperative renderGraph function that should be extracted
acceptanceCriteria: Rendering logic separated from Preact component

features.title: Type Safety Improvements
features.description: Fix type safety issues and improve TypeScript usage

tasks.title: Fix PRDItem type safety
tasks.description: PRDItem interface has index signature that defeats TypeScript checking

tasks.title: Fix validateDocument type erasure
tasks.description: PRDItemSchema typed as ZodType<Record<string, unknown>> erases type information
acceptanceCriteria: No casting required at call sites

tasks.title: Replace Record<string, unknown> with discriminated unions
tasks.description: Detail panel uses duck-typing instead of proper type discrimination
acceptanceCriteria: Discriminated union for detail panel data

features.title: Dependency Management
features.description: Fix circular dependencies and improve module organization

tasks.title: Extract shared types to break circular dependencies
tasks.description: Fix triangle dependency (core ↔ completion ↔ guard ↔ core) by extracting shared types into dedicated interface zone
acceptanceCriteria: Circular dependency between core, completion, and guard zones is resolved
Shared types moved to dedicated interface zone
Independent testing and deployment of zones enabled
Integration tests added for security-critical paths

tasks.title: Isolate schema types from core zone
tasks.description: Move schema types to dedicated types/schema zone to break implicit dependencies for all consumers
acceptanceCriteria: Schema types no longer exported from core
All consumers updated to use new import paths

tasks.title: Split Hench zone into focused modules
tasks.description: Extract storage and schema from 49-file Hench Core zone into separate zones
acceptanceCriteria: Storage logic extracted to separate zone
Schema logic extracted to separate zone
Core zone focused on agent logic only

tasks.title: Fix circular dependency in agent/guard modules
tasks.description: Resolve tools.ts importing guard while guard/commands.ts imports types from agent
acceptanceCriteria: Shared types extracted to common module
Interface/abstraction introduced to invert dependency direction

tasks.title: Add Hench package root barrel file
tasks.description: Create src/index.ts barrel file so external consumers don't need to import from internal paths
acceptanceCriteria: External consumers can import from package root

tasks.title: Fix misplaced completion test file
tasks.description: Investigate completion-validation.test.ts placement - tests tools/ code but lives in completion zone
acceptanceCriteria: Test file moved to correct zone or logic refactored

tasks.title: Fix tools.ts guard import bypass
tasks.description: Update tools.ts to import from guard/index.ts barrel instead of direct guard/commands.ts import
acceptanceCriteria: tools.ts uses guard public API through barrel file

features.title: Test Coverage Expansion
features.description: Add missing tests for critical functionality

tasks.title: Add next-steps analyzer tests
tasks.description: next-steps.ts is untracked with zero test coverage

tasks.title: Add core graph algorithm tests
tasks.description: louvainPhase1, mergeBidirectionalCoupling, capZoneCount have no direct unit tests

tasks.title: Add enrich.ts utility function tests
tasks.description: tryParseJSON, buildMetaPrompt, getPassConfig are untested
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests for all utility functions

tasks.title: Add validation function tests
tasks.description: validateImports and validateZones have zero test cases

tasks.title: Split mega-test files
tasks.description: zones.test.ts (1265 lines) spans 3 modules, components.test.ts (696 lines) tests 2 modules
acceptanceCriteria: Dedicated test file for each module

tasks.title: Extract shared test utilities
tasks.description: renderToDiv and factory functions are duplicated across test files
acceptanceCriteria: Factory functions available to all tests

tasks.title: Enhance test fixture coverage
tasks.description: Current fixtures lack edge cases and coverage scenarios

features.title: Test Project Fixtures
features.description: Maintain small test projects for testing analysis capabilities

tasks.title: Maintain test fixtures directory
tasks.description: Keep small test projects (TypeScript, Remix) in tests/fixtures/ for testing analysis capabilities
acceptanceCriteria: Test fixtures cover major project types

features.title: Data Validation Improvements
features.description: Strengthen validation and error handling throughout the system

tasks.title: Fix asymmetric log validation
tasks.description: readLog() casts without validation while appendLog() validates with Zod
acceptanceCriteria: Symmetric validation in both read and write operations

tasks.title: Add transaction support to analyze accept flow
tasks.description: analyze --accept writes items sequentially with no rollback on failure
acceptanceCriteria: Atomic operations for bulk item creation

tasks.title: Add timeout to sourcevision MCP calls
tasks.description: callSourceVisionMCP uses raw spawn with no timeout, can block indefinitely

features.title: Rate Limiting and Retry Logic
features.description: Improve handling of external service limitations

tasks.title: Add backoff to AI rate limit retries
tasks.description: Rate-limit errors trigger immediate retry with no backoff delay
acceptanceCriteria: Exponential backoff on rate limit errors

features.title: Configuration Consolidation
features.description: Eliminate duplicate configuration definitions and improve consistency

tasks.title: Consolidate version and directory constants
tasks.description: SV_DIR and TOOL_VERSION independently defined in 3 files
acceptanceCriteria: Single source of truth for constants
All files import from shared location

tasks.title: Consolidate REX_DIR constants
tasks.description: REX_DIR constant duplicated between CLI commands and MCP server
acceptanceCriteria: Both entry points use shared constant

tasks.title: Fix VALID_STATUSES hardcoding
tasks.description: update.ts hardcodes status sets instead of deriving from Zod enums

features.title: Schema Consistency
features.description: Ensure schema definitions are complete and consistent

tasks.title: Add missing schema validation
tasks.description: metaEvaluationCount exists in schema but absent from Zod validation
acceptanceCriteria: All schema fields have Zod validation

tasks.title: Fix generic prefix inconsistencies
tasks.description: GENERIC_PREFIXES and GENERIC_SEGMENTS serve same purpose but differ
acceptanceCriteria: Single source of truth for prefixes

features.title: Build and Package Scripts
features.description: Maintain build scripts and package management commands

tasks.title: Maintain build:viewer script
tasks.description: Ensure build:viewer script (node build.js) works correctly for sourcevision package

tasks.title: Maintain typecheck script
tasks.description: Ensure monorepo-wide typecheck script (pnpm -r run typecheck) works correctly

tasks.title: Maintain test:watch script
tasks.description: Ensure test:watch script (vitest) works correctly for hench package

tasks.title: Maintain validate script
tasks.description: Ensure monorepo-wide validate script (pnpm -r run validate) works correctly

tasks.title: Maintain prepare script
tasks.description: Ensure prepare script (npm run build) works correctly for hench package

features.title: Natural Language PRD Interface
features.description: Smart add functionality that leverages LLM to structure requirements

tasks.title: Implement multi-description support for rex add
tasks.description: Allow rex add to accept multiple descriptions in a single command: rex add "auth system" "payment processing" "admin dashboard"
acceptanceCriteria: Supports multiple quoted descriptions in one command
LLM processes all descriptions together for better structure

tasks.title: Add piped input support to rex add
tasks.description: Support piping text input to rex add command
acceptanceCriteria: Works with echo "build user settings page" | rex add

tasks.title: Implement file-based idea import
tasks.description: Add rex add --file=ideas.txt to read freeform text files and structure them
acceptanceCriteria: Reads freeform text files of brainstorming notes
LLM structures rough ideas into proper PRD hierarchy
Distinct from analyze --file which imports formal specs
